description: This file defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) related to loan application draft operations, including creation, update, patch, reading readiness status, submission, and response models. It uses Java records and annotations for schema documentation and validation.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos
classes.description: A utility class containing various nested records for loan draft operations.

methods.name: CreateRequest
methods.description: Request payload to create a new loan application draft.

methods.name: UpdateRequest
methods.description: Full update payload for an existing loan draft.

methods.name: SectionPatchRequest
methods.description: Partial update payload for a specific section of the draft.

methods.name: ReadinessResponse
methods.description: Response indicating whether the draft is ready for submission.

methods.name: SubmitRequest
methods.description: Payload to submit a draft for review or processing.

methods.name: DraftResponse
methods.description: Response model representing a loan draft's data and status.
